Oracle Select AI 26ai

Enhanced Natural Language to SQL capabilities with feedback mechanism for improved accuracy and learning.

Category Productivity
Pricing Variable (Oracle Autonomous AI Database pricing)
Released April 2026 (26ai release)
Visit Oracle Select AI 26ai →

About Oracle Select AI 26ai

The Oracle Select AI 26ai release significantly enhances Natural Language to SQL (NL2SQL) capabilities by introducing a "Feedback" mechanism, among other improvements, to refine SQL query generation. Oracle 26ai represents a fundamental shift in database architecture, integrating artificial intelligence directly into the database kernel to allow for semantic interaction with data. Key aspects include: NL2SQL allows users to interact with data using natural language prompts to generate, execute, explain, or narrate SQL queries; Feedback for NL2SQL (new in 26ai) allows users to provide feedback on SQL accuracy/relevance to build a repository of prompts and corresponding feedback for prompt tuning; Vector index for learning is automatically created when feedback is first used to identify similar prompts and provide top matching examples as additional metadata; Types of Feedback include positive feedback to confirm accuracy and negative feedback to point out errors or offer guidance; Other enhancements include automatic object selection to send only relevant table metadata, enriched prompt metadata sources, data control for administrators to limit data sent to LLM, and reduced hallucinations to prevent LLM from generating incorrect table names. Oracle Select AI 26ai aims to make database interaction more intuitive and efficient, enabling broader range of users to leverage enterprise data through natural language.

Pros & Cons

✅ Pros

  • Significantly enhanced Natural Language to SQL (NL2SQL) capabilities
  • Feedback mechanism for NL2SQL allows learning from user interactions
  • Automatically creates vector index for prompt tuning and similarity search
  • Positive feedback confirms accuracy, negative feedback points out errors/guidance
  • Automatic object selection sends only relevant table metadata to LLM
  • Enriched prompt metadata sources include table comments, foreign keys, annotations
  • Data control allows administrators to limit data sent to LLM for security/compliance
  • Reduced hallucinations prevents LLM from generating incorrect table names

❌ Cons

  • Requires Oracle Autonomous AI Database or Oracle AI Database 26ai deployment
  • May be complex for users needing only basic NL2SQL without advanced features
  • Pricing variable based on Oracle cloud database services and usage
  • Learning curve for utilizing all advanced NL2SQL enhancements and feedback features

Best For

Users who want to interact with enterprise data through natural language with improved accuracy and learning capabilities.

Tags

productivitydatabaseainatural languagesqlnl2sql
